sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_fill (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_array_fill (id, values) VALUES (1, [1, null, 3, null, 5]);
UPDATE test_array_fill SET values = arrayFill(x -> not isNull(x), values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayFill(x -> not isNull(x), values) AS filled_values FROM test_array_fill;
SELECT id FROM test_array_fill WHERE arrayFill(x -> x > 2, values) = [3, 5];
